description: Omega-Tier W3C Design Tokens for MENA Government Web Portals (High Accessibility, High Trust).

primary.description: Authority Navy - Used for Primary Headers and Trust elements.

secondary.description: Prosperity Green - Used for Primary Actions (Submit/Verify).

base.description: Accessible Off-White to reduce glare for long-form reading.

high-contrast.description: Passes WCAG 2.1 AAA accessibility standards against bg-base.

base.description: 18px base size to ensure immediate legibility for older demographics.
